name: 24"x36" Oversized Floral Bath Rug - Threshold™
description:
You'll love stepping out of the shower and onto the super soft Oversized Floral Bath Rug from Threshold™. The tufted bath rug is crafted from cotton fabric to provide soft comfort underfoot and help keep your floors dry as you step out of the bath or shower. Showcasing a vibrant, charming floral pattern, you can place the rug by the tub or in front of the sink to bring style and convenient comfort to your bath space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
